records.question: What apartments in The Eugene have exactly 9 rooms, are Studio type with apartment number Apt. 187, and have at least 3 bathrooms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
WHERE apartments.room_count = '9' AND apartment_buildings.building_full_name = 'The Eugene' AND apartments.apt_number = 'Apt. 187' AND apartments.apt_type_code = 'Studio' AND apartments.bathroom_count >= 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Facilities AS T3 ON T1.apt_id = T3.apt_id WHERE T1.room_count = '9' AND T1.apt_number = 'Apt. 187' AND T1.apt_type_code = 'Studio' AND T1.bathroom_count >= 3 AND T2.building_full_name = 'The Eugene'

records.question: Which apartments have exactly 8 rooms and currently have a booking with the status Provisional?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
JOIN apartment_bookings ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_bookings.apt_id
WHERE apartments.room_count = '8' AND apartment_bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Facilities AS T3 ON T1.apt_id = T3.apt_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Bookings AS T4 ON T1.apt_id = T4.apt_id WHERE T1.room_count = '8' AND T4.booking_status_code = 'Provisional'

records.question: What apartments are Duplexes located in buildings with the phone number 1-667-728-2287x3158?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
WHERE apartments.apt_type_code = 'Duplex' AND apartment_buildings.building_phone = '1-667-728-2287x3158'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id WHERE T1.apt_type_code = 'Duplex' AND T2.building_phone = '1-667-728-2287x3158'

records.question: Which apartments are in buildings with the phone number 1-724-982-9507x640 and include a gym facility?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
WHERE apartment_facilities.facility_code = 'Gym' AND apartment_buildings.building_phone = '1-724-982-9507x640'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Facilities AS T3 ON T1.apt_id = T3.apt_id WHERE T2.building_phone = '1-724-982-9507x640' AND T3.facility_code = 'Gym'

records.question: Which apartments in Columbus Square have Apt. 859 as the apartment number, exactly 3 bedrooms, 6 rooms total, a confirmed booking, and a building phone number of 1-724-982-9507x640?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_bookings ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_bookings.apt_id
JOIN view_unit_status ON apartments.apt_id = view_unit_status.apt_id
WHERE apartments.apt_number = 'Apt. 859' AND apartments.bedroom_count = 3 AND apartment_buildings.building_phone = '1-724-982-9507x640' AND apartment_bookings.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed' AND apartment_buildings.building_full_name = 'Columbus Square' AND apartments.room_count = '6'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Bookings AS T3 ON T1.apt_id = T3.apt_id INNER JOIN View_Unit_Status AS T4 ON T1.apt_id = T4.apt_id WHERE T1.apt_number = 'Apt. 859' AND T1.bedroom_count = 3 AND T1.room_count = '6' AND T2.building_phone = '1-724-982-9507x640' AND T2.building_full_name = 'Columbus Square' AND T3.booking_status_code = 'Confirmed' GROUP BY T1.apt_id

records.question: Which flats at Stuyvesant Town managed by Marie have exactly Apt. 585 with 5 rooms, at least 4 bedrooms, at least 2 bathrooms, and include Boardband as a facility?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
WHERE apartments.apt_type_code = 'Flat' AND apartments.bathroom_count >= 2 AND apartments.bedroom_count >= 4 AND apartment_facilities.facility_code = 'Boardband' AND apartment_buildings.building_manager = 'Marie' AND apartment_buildings.building_full_name = 'Stuyvesant Town' AND apartments.apt_number = 'Apt. 585' AND apartments.room_count = '5'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.apt_id FROM Apartments AS T1 INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings AS T2 ON T1.building_id = T2.building_id INNER JOIN Apartment_Facilities AS T3 ON T1.apt_id = T3.apt_id WHERE T1.apt_type_code = 'Flat' AND T1.bathroom_count >= 2 AND T1.bedroom_count >= 4 AND T1.apt_number = 'Apt. 585' AND T1.room_count = '5' AND T2.building_manager = 'Marie' AND T2.building_full_name = 'Stuyvesant Town' AND T3.facility_code = 'Boardband'

records.question: Which flats have at least 3 bedrooms but no more than 1 bathroom?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
WHERE apartments.apt_type_code = 'Flat' AND apartments.bedroom_count >= 3 AND apartments.bathroom_count <= 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT apt_id FROM Apartments WHERE apt_type_code = 'Flat' AND bedroom_count >= 3 AND bathroom_count <= 1
